# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write Kong configuration file (kong.conf) for production deployment. Set admin_listen to configure Admin API accessibility. Define proxy_listen for client traffic and database connection settings. This is for our Kong Gateway deployment.
# Category: kong_admin_api_exposed

# Kong Configuration File for Production Deployment
# ====================================================

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# General Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Prefix for Kong's working directory
prefix = /usr/local/kong

# Log level: debug, info, notice, warn, error, crit
log_level = notice

# Proxy Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Listen addresses for client-facing traffic (HTTP and HTTPS)
proxy_listen = 0.0.0.0:8000 reuseport backlog=16384, 0.0.0.0:8443 http2 ssl reuseport backlog=16384
proxy_access_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/proxy_access.log
proxy_error_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/proxy_error.log

# Admin API Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Restrict Admin API to localhost only for security in production
# Use a secure internal network or loopback interface; never expose publicly
admin_listen = 127.0.0.1:8001, 127.0.0.1:8444 ssl
admin_access_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/admin_access.log
admin_error_log = /usr/local/kong/logs/admin_error.log

# Admin GUI (Kong Manager) Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
admin_gui_listen = 127.0.0.1:8002, 127.0.0.1:8445 ssl
admin_gui_url = https://localhost:8445

# Status listener for health checks (used by load balancers and monitoring)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
status_listen = 0.0.0.0:8100

# Database Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Database type: postgres or cassandra (postgres recommended for production)
database = postgres

# PostgreSQL connection settings
pg_host = 127.0.0.1
pg_port = 5432
pg_user = kong
pg_password = kong_secure_password_change_me
pg_database = kong
pg_schema = public
pg_ssl = on
pg_ssl_verify = on

# PostgreSQL connection pool settings for production performance
pg_pool_size = 50
pg_backlog = 256
pg_timeout = 60000

# Read replica settings (optional - for scaling read operations)
# pg_ro_host = 127.0.0.1
# pg_ro_port = 5432
# pg_ro_user = kong_read
# pg_ro_password = kong_read_secure_password_change_me
# pg_ro_database = kong
# pg_ro_schema = public
# pg_ro_ssl = on

# DNS Resolver Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
dns_resolver = 8.8.8.8,8.8.4.4
dns_hostsfile = /etc/hosts
dns_order = LAST,SRV,A,CNAME
dns_stale_ttl = 4
dns_not_found_ttl = 30
dns_error_ttl = 1
dns_no_sync = off

# SSL / TLS Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
ssl_cipher_suite = intermediate
ssl_protocols = TLSv1.2 TLSv1.3

# Paths to default SSL certificate and key for HTTPS proxy traffic
# ssl_cert = /usr/local/kong/ssl/kong-default.crt
# ssl_cert_key = /usr/local/kong/ssl/kong-default.key

# Paths to Admin API SSL certificate and key
# admin_ssl_cert = /usr/local/kong/ssl/admin-kong.crt
# admin_ssl_cert_key = /usr/local/kong/ssl/admin-kong.key

# Trusted SSL certificates for upstream verification
# lua_ssl_trusted_certificate = /etc/ssl/certs/ca-certificates.crt
lua_ssl_verify_depth = 2

# Performance and Tuning
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Set number of worker processes (auto = number of CPU cores)
nginx_worker_processes = auto

# Worker connections per worker process
nginx_events_worker_connections = 16384

# Upstream keepalive connections
upstream_keepalive_pool_size = 512
upstream_keepalive_max_requests = 1000
upstream_keepalive_idle_timeout = 60

# Nginx directives for production tuning
nginx_http_client_max_body_size = 16m
nginx_http_client_body_buffer_size = 16k
nginx_http_keepalive_timeout = 75
nginx_http_keepalive_requests = 1000
nginx_http_sendfile = on
nginx_http_tcp_nopush = on
nginx_http_tcp_nodelay = on
nginx_http_gzip = on
nginx_http_gzip_types = application/json application/xml text/plain text/css application/javascript

# Proxy buffering settings
nginx_proxy_proxy_buffer_size = 16k
nginx_proxy_proxy_buffers = 4 32k
nginx_proxy_proxy_busy_buffers_size = 64k

# Lua shared memory dictionaries
mem_cache_size = 256m

# Declarative Configuration (DB-less mode only)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Uncomment the following if running in DB-less mode
# database = off
# declarative_config = /usr/local/kong/kong.yml

# Plugin Settings
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Comma-separated list of plugins to load (bundled = all default plugins)
plugins = bundled

# Rate Limiting plugin default settings
# Uncomment and configure as needed
# nginx_http_lua_shared_dict_kong_rate_limiting_counters = 12m

# Logging and Monitoring
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Enable anonymous usage reporting (set to off in production if desired)
anonymous_reports = off

# Tracing and observability
# tracing_instrumentations = all
# tracing_sampling_rate = 0.01

# Cluster and Hybrid Mode Settings (for multi-node deployments)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# role = control_plane | data_plane | traditional
# cluster_cert = /usr/local/kong/cluster/cluster.crt
# cluster_cert_key = /usr/local/kong/cluster/cluster.key
# cluster_control_plane = control-plane.example.com:8005
# cluster_telemetry_endpoint = control-plane.example.com:8006

# Vault Settings (for secrets management)
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# vaults = bundled

# Headers returned by Kong
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
headers = server_tokens, latency_tokens, X-Kong-Proxy-Latency, X-Kong-Upstream-Latency

# Error handling
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Custom error templates directory
# nginx_http_error_page_500_502_503_504 = /usr/local/kong/error_pages/custom_error.html
